'''竏喩-v-b-m''' ('''kagavbemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machiavellize|machiavellize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machiavellize|machiavellize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-v-b-m
|-
! Lemma
| kagavbemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigavbemoko || jigavbemoko || shigavbemoko || kigavbemoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugavbemoko || jujugavbemoko || shushugavbemoko || kukugavbemoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugavbemoko || jugavbemoko || shugavbemoko || kugavbemoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugavbemoko || jugavbemoko || shugavbemoko || kugavbemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegavbemoko || jegavbemoko || shegavbemoko || kegavbemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogavbemoko || jojogavbemoko || shoshogavbemoko || kokogavbemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogavbemoko || jogavbemoko || shogavbemoko || kogavbemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogavbemoko || jogavbemoko || shogavbemoko || kogavbemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko || gavbemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦgavbemoko || jﾃｦgavbemoko || shﾃｦgavbemoko || kﾃｦgavbemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagavbemoko || jajagavbemoko || shashagavbemoko || kakagavbemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagavbemoko || jagavbemoko || shagavbemoko || kagavbemoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagavbemoko || jagavbemoko || shagavbemoko || kagavbemoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shagavbemithi || shagavbemiji || shagavbemishi || shagavbemiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || shagavbemuthu || shagavbemuju || shagavbemushu || shagavbemuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shagavbemuthu || shagavbemuju || shagavbemushu || shagavbemuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || shagavbemuthuf || shagavbemujuf || shagavbemushuf || shagavbemukuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || shagavbemethe || shagavbemeje || shagavbemeshe || shagavbemeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || shagavbemotho || shagavbemojo || shagavbemosho || shagavbemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || shagavbemotho || shagavbemojo || shagavbemosho || shagavbemoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || shagavbemothof || shagavbemojof || shagavbemoshof || shagavbemokof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf || shagavbemﾃｯf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shagavbemﾃｦthﾃｦ || shagavbemﾃｦjﾃｦ || shagavbemﾃｦshﾃｦ || shagavbemﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shagavbematha || shagavbemaja || shagavbemasha || shagavbemaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shagavbematha || shagavbemaja || shagavbemasha || shagavbemaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shagavbemathaf || shagavbemajaf || shagavbemashaf || shagavbemakaf
|}
